messages.author: zoe
messages.text: If the projection fails after we commit Kafka, we cannot replay that customer update.

messages.author: liam
messages.text: Commit offsets only after the PostgreSQL projection succeeds. Duplicates can happen, so keep idempotency keys.

messages.author: maya
messages.text: Exactly-once transactions are an alternative, but I do not think their operational cost is justified.
